---
name: Engine Integration
about: Propose or request a new load testing engine integration
title: '[ENGINE] '
labels: engine-integration
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Provide a brief summary of the proposed load testing engine integration (e.g., custom scripts, wrappers, reports).

## Environment
* Related Engine: [k6 / JMeter / LoadRunner / custom / none]
* Engine Version: (e.g., k6 v0.51.0, JMeter 5.6.3)

## Proposed Scenario / Workload
Describe the scenario, test script format, or parameters required to configure this engine integration.

## Expected Behavior
Describe how the worker agent should trigger this engine and parse its execution results/metrics.

## Actual Behavior
(If reporting an integration failure) How does the current system behave or fail when handling this engine?

## Additional Context
Add any documentation, API specifications, or sample scripts of the engine.
